name: mmm-bin-days
description: MagicMirror module that displays upcoming household bin collections, backed by Supabase.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['MMM-Bin-Days.js','MMM-Bin-Days.css','node_helper.js'].forEach(f=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f))throw new Error('Missing '+f);});console.log('MMM-Bin-Days: all module files present.');"
